creator: xiuli.pan@intel.com
text:
Hi,

I have seen the patch you sent to beignet mail-list. I could not reproduce the problem, could you provide the llvm version, libdrm version and build options of the Beignet.

You can try to post beignet bugs to our Bugzilla
https://bugs.freedesktop.org/enter_bug.cgi?product=Beignet

Thanks
Xiuli
